title: aster eriensis
intro: Aster eriensis, also known as the western American mountain aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Aster eriensis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
